description: From the Publisher Vileda Cordomatic Retractable Washing Line A great space saving washing line! Benefits 15 metres of retractable line which can be locked at any length Holds up to 15kg of laundry Strong ABS plastic container with galvanised fittings, extremely durable Space-saving and durable The Cordomatic is a great space saving washing line. The wall mountable unit has 15 metres of retractable line which can be locked at any length up to 15m. Once your washing is dry the line easily retracts back into the unit to keep it clean and tangle free. This also means your garden space is clear. Complete with galvanised fittings with a strong ABS plastic container this product is extremely durable. Flexible line length Retractable line length can be locked at lengths of 1-15m. For both indoor and outdoor use. ABS Container Strong and durable ABS plastic container protects the line from extreme weather conditions and keeps the lines clean and tangle free. Easy to install This set comes complete with galvanised steel fittings, screws and wall plugs so can be attached to the wall with minimal effort. Large Loads Extra strong washing line. Holds weights upto 15kg. When fully extended and loaded use a clothes prop for additional support. Vileda Sun-Lift 40m 4 Arm Compact Rotary Washing Line with Rotary Line Cover ... Vileda Supadry Hoist Rotary Dryer, Silver, 60m Vileda Sun-Rise Compact Outdoor Rotary Clothes Dryer, No-Sag Washing Lines, R...
